items.title: [负面] The gacha is deceptively "generous". The numbers o...
items.summary:
The gacha is deceptively "generous". The numbers of free pulls and the chance to get SSR seem high (1 out of 30). However, the utility/power of the SSR you get is massively different, and the probability of you getting random trash SSR instead is quite high, so the real chance of getting the one you're aiming for is more like 1 out of 90. Also the best characters that can carry the game needs 12 dupes, not one or two, TWELVE. A character's kit is intentionally gimped at 0 dupe.

The gameplay is basically Slay the Spire, which is very time consuming and doesn't mesh well with the gacha game model.  I played for 12 hours, got showered in first time reward freebies, got around 30 SSRs, 4 of which being the one I was aiming for. Or I can just spend like $10 IAP to get the same amount, because the paid currency only gacha rate is infinitely better than the free gacha.

I know I'm rambling a lot of gacha but the game is revolved around that, with the enemies HP and damage numbers ramping up multiplicatively, and with the shield mechanic of StS that means without sufficient numbers you'll just get clobbered, there's just no playing around it, well, except grinding for hours and hours on end (or spend a few bucks). 

In StS games you want to experiment around with different/new builds (horizontal progression), but Morimens's gacha (diluted pool of unbalanced SSR characters/gears, heavy dupe reliant) and grinding (weeks of energy to farm materials to level up 1 character to usable state) model actively discourages that. To progress you need to invest everything in a few characters (vertical progression), which makes the grinding even worse because you are stuck doing the same thing over and over again, only difference is numbers going bigger. I guess some people can enjoy that but not for me.

EDIT: disabling replies as some bad faith people pointing out 1 mistake I made "acktually you don't need 12 dupes" and called me a liar. I just checked the leaderboard of the end game mode, saw players using characters with number 12 on the dupe indicator and wrongly assumed. 1,2,12, I tried to be tongue-in-cheek and failed. "Need" is also too strong a word, so I'll try to rephrase. 
- Getting 1-3 dupes ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ a character's kit.
- Getting 8 dupes unlocks a massive powerup, 9-15 dupes only make numbers bigger.
- Forgot to mention there's also weapon (wheel) gacha at same rate, up to 90 rolls per copy. Getting 15 dupes of a SSR weapon is another massive power up because only then can a char use 2 SSRs at the same time, very inconvenient restriction and unnecessary whale bait.
- Farming materials to max 1 char's level/cards/skill takes months, not weeks. 
Extraneous rants:
- Your HP is also tied to account level which increases very slowly. You get HP debuff from attempting content at higher recommended lvl. There are "VIP tiers" that increase account exp gain from buying IAP.
- They constantly push IAP pop-ups in your face, every login, after clearing a chapter, after getting a new character, after getting a dupe, for every event rewards you get you are reminded there are much better paid tier rewards right next to it.
- The last boss is literally doing the same thing over and over again with bigger numbers. You kill it, it respawns with more damage/damage resistance, again, and again, and again, I lost count. The "event" when I played also use that same boss.
- I did clear all the campaign and event challenge mode using the same 3 chars+ 1 flexible slot, with the broken newest char being at only 3 dupes. She can literally do 100 times more damage than the base dps character, provide shield based on your max HP that retain half to next turn, draw 4 cards and give 4 energy per turn, generate almost endless keyflare (mana for special skills). Using the base/older chars is absolutely miserable in comparison. But sure, you don't "need" to use the newest chars or many dupes.
- End game mode requires 5 different teams (20 chars+40 weapons), plus another 5 for whales. I can barely clear the 3rd difficulty out of 5, and material for lv up from 70-80 is locked behind clearing 4th/5th difficulty iirc. After calculating time required to grind for 1 functional team I just noped right out.

items.title: [正面] Daré mi opinión sincera sobre este juego, ya con e...
items.summary:
Daré mi opinión sincera sobre este juego, ya con experiencia de haber jugado otros gachas.

Empezaré por lo positivo, que en mi opinión hay bastante y no se nombra lo suficiente en las reseñas:

1. A pesar de ser un gacha, la obtención de personajes es super sencilla. Tiene varios eventos que te permiten elegir personajes gratis, ya sea por conectarte a diario, etc. También los banners tanto permanentes como temporales, tienen porcentajes de drop muchísimo más altos que otros gachas; hay algunos que tienen probabilidad del 3% y otros de hasta el 6%. Apenas tengo un par de horas jugadas, y ya me han salido 7 personajes SSR distintos, que además he podido elegir yo seleccionando su facción, la de los vampiros concretamente. 
2. Desde que acabas el prólogo el juego te bombardea a recompensas, más de 100 tiradas, te da personajes gratis, recursos de experiencia, etc. 
3. La ambientación estilo relato de Lovecraft le da un toque muy lúgubre, misterioso y a veces hasta detectivesco. Quien juegue solo para hacer skip a todo no sé para qué lo ha instalado, si la gracia de los juegos con historia es justo eso, leer la historia para apegarte a ese mundo y sus personajes. 
4. El combate es sencillito, un clon de otros juegos tipo slay the spire. Algunas cartas tienen bastante texto, pero contienen versión resumida y acabas aprendiendo qué hace cada una tras unos cuantos usos. 
5. La estética es hermosa, tiene en efecto monas chinas, pero las combinan con elementos Lovecraftianos como tentáculos, ojos, extremidades hechas de hueso, etc. No es el típico juego de waifus con poca ropa, al menos han apelado al gusto por el horror cósmico y no a lo que tienes entre las piernas. 

Lo malo:

1. La traducción es comprensible pero deja mucho que desear en ocasiones, usando palabras sin sentido o literalmente no traduciendo X palabras. Me entero de qué sucede, pero siento que lo entendería mejor en inglés.
2. Los cuadros de diálogo. Esto es por MUCHO lo que más odio del juego; los diálogos rotan solos hacia abajo, y siempre queda la mitad del texto oculta por el tamaño del cuadro, así que tienes que abrir el historial para ver qué han dicho los personajes. Se vuelve muy desagradable hacer esto todo el rato, bastaría con reducir el tamaño de texto para que quepa entero, o al menos permitir hacer scroll en dicho cuadro. 
3. Si de gameplay intuitivo se trata, Chaos Zero Nightmare hace lo mismo pero mucho mejor, con efectos de carta más cortos e intuitivos. Lo malo es que está en inglés, pero al menos aprendes el gamestyle más rápido y los diálogos se visualizan mejor. Eso sí, la obtención de personajes es baja, los diseños menos currados y las chicas... digamos que viven en un mundo donde un short ajustado y un top ceñido es el traje ideal para matar monstruos. 
4. La interfaz del menú es un poco caótica, pero no tanto como para llamarlo una cosa malísima. 
5. Los textos de las cinemáticas y ciertas escenas pasan demasiado rápido, no alcanzas a leer ni la mitad de lo que dicen.
6. Comparado a su diseño en el menú y los banners, los personajes dejan mucho que desear en combate, podrían haberlos hecho versión chibi para que se parezcan más, en vez de monigotes genéricos. 

Eso sería más o menos todo por el momento. Espero que este juego de veras triunfe y arreglen todas sus carencias. No recomiendo gastar dinero en su gacha puesto que los personajes se consiguen fácil; si sabéis inglés ni os molestéis en usar la traducción con IA. Procurad seguir dando feedback para que la empresa sepa en qué está fallando, no quiero ver otro gacha con potencial cerrando sus puertas, menos aún uno basado en Los Mitos de Cthulhu, cosa que adoro.

items.title:
[正面] 컨텐츠 정말 많고 다양합니다
기본 재화로 얻을 수 있는 기본 캐릭터들 성능도 준수하고요
플...
items.summary:
컨텐츠 정말 많고 다양합니다
기본 재화로 얻을 수 있는 기본 캐릭터들 성능도 준수하고요
플레이시간 (턴)이 길어지는게 단점이자 장점입니다
힘든 전투도 시간을 많이 쓰거나 전략적으로 행동하면 시스템적으로 결국 이길 수 있도록 만든게 정말 큰 장점이에요
물론 한정 캐릭터의 성능이 기본 캐릭터랑 차이나는 경우가 있긴 합니다만, 기본적으로 전체 캐릭터들로 모든 컨텐츠를 다 즐길 수 있어요
잘 만든 게임입니다
한국어 번역도 일본 중국 게임 많이 하신분들은 대충된 것도 얼추 볼만해요
글로벌 서버인 채로 한국어 정식으로 번역이 들어오면 기쁠 것 같네요 (한국 서버로 따로 여는건 유지비 대비 가성비가 별로라 서버가 간당간당할 것 같아서 불호.)

it shows a low play time but i did play a bit more (like 3 hours on mobile) and this is one of the BEST ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ gacha games there are

Its so ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ generous which is fine but for normal players

This game story is genuinely so good, it actually goes into dark and mature themes and the world building is great, the gameplay itself is amazing, just try it out for an hour or 2 its amazing

items.title: [正面] Genuinely don't have the words to explain how much...
items.summary: Genuinely don't have the words to explain how much I love this game. The concept is unique, the playstyle is fun, the art is absolutely stunning, the characters are complex, the progression is well-paced, the pvp mode is fun (and optional), the devs are fantastic people, and the game is insanely generous with rewards and very f2p-friendly. The anniversary rewards alone were 200+ pulls, nevermind the updates and collection rewards they added. I'm not usually one to drop money on a game but I've thrown more money at them than I'd like to admit because, frankly, this is the kind of game that I can trust to give me equal return for my money and could actually use the financial support. I love Morimens so, so much.

items.title: [正面] ive been playing this game for a week (on my phone...
items.summary:
ive been playing this game for a week (on my phone) and im so hooked !
the art is gorgeous and also the music, the story is rich and the turn based gameplay feels refreshing
it is a gacha game but honest you get so many rewards that it doesnt feel like it, plus theres no meta in the characters from what i know so you can play with a lot of unique teams!
from what ive seen the team behind this game is a small team that try their best to also translate the game to english (english still works in the game its just on beta so some translation may not be right).

also if youre a new player or someone with an mythag invite feel free to use my code so we can both get rewards!!
my invitation code: LUTOBTDGY4
